name: O-13 finding reports the replaced_by successor token as a migration hint per §26
command: mkdir -p src && printf 'const c = tokens.color.legacy.red;\n' > src/c.ts && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/design-token-freshness.sh" --registry "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/design-tokens/registry.yaml" --paths src 2>err.txt && grep -q 'replaced_by=color.signal.danger' err.txt && echo hinted 1>&2
